name: Absolute-Full-Life
short_description: Colourful survival horror first-person shooter with manual weapon reloading and a mystery environment. Discover every secrets in an open world full of diverse enemies and hidden locations.
detailed_description:
Warning: This game is not intended for people with photosensitive epilepsy.


Translated:
Why Absolute-Full-Life?

you can middle finger
your enemies when they
annoy you a lot

Here you will find
manual reloading that
you can do with
the mouse

Many complex
puzzles also with
decisions that will have
consequences for
the future

Re-usable weapons
with different
upguards that
cause less in-game
dying, on a variant
of complex enemies

A big open world like
your mom of different
unique places that
require better
equipment and
don't cuddle
with you

you can have
your own dog
sidekick, if of course you
pass the test that leads
to getting one

Key elements:
  • Manual reloading
  • Unique graphics and styling
  • Non-linear story containing several secrets side quests
  • Up to several weapons with different benefits
  • Unique enemies on which different tactics apply
  • Your dad will come back home with milk
